content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/src/lib/auth.ts:1	import { PrismaAdapter } from "@next-auth/prisma-adapter";2	import { NextAuthOptions } from "next-auth";3	import CredentialsProvider from "next-auth/providers/credentials";4	import { prisma } from "./prisma";5	import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";6	7	export const authOptions: NextAuthOptions = {8	  adapter: PrismaAdapter(prisma),9	  session: {10	    strategy: "jwt",11	  },12	  pages: {13	    signIn: "/login",14	  },15	  providers: [16	    CredentialsProvider({17	      name: "Credentials",18	      credentials: {19	        email: { label: "Email", type: "email" },20	        password: { label: "Password", type: "password" },21	      },22	      async authorize(credentials) {23	        if (!credentials?.email || !credentials?.password) {24	          return null;25	        }26	27	        const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({28	          where: { email: credentials.email },29	        });30	31	        if (!user || !user.password) {32	          return null;33	        }34	35	        const isPasswordValid = await bcrypt.compare(36	          credentials.password,37	          user.password38	        );39	40	        if (!isPasswordValid) {41	          return null;42	        }43	44	        return {45	          id: user.id,46	          email: user.email,47	          name: user.name,48	          role: user.role,49	        };50	      },51	    }),52	  ],53	  callbacks: {54	    async session({ token, session }) {55	      if (token) {56	        session.user.id = token.id;57	        session.user.name = token.name;58	        session.user.email = token.email;59	        session.user.role = token.role;60	      }61	      return session;62	    },63	    async jwt({ token, user }) {64	      const dbUser = await prisma.user.findFirst({65	        where: { email: token.email },66	      });67	68	      if (!dbUser) {69	        if (user) {70	          token.id = user.id;71	        }72	        return token;73	      }74	75	      return {76	        id: dbUser.id,77	        name: dbUser.name,78	        email: dbUser.email,79	        role: dbUser.role,80	      };81	    },82	  },83	};
